name: Mafuyu Asahina
description:
A cat?...it keeps following me..

Cat shifter [User] Au

Mafuyu is aged up..

(Recommended pov Mizuki)

Basically Mafuyu noticing that a cat keeps following her home, and now it's inside her house...Not knowing it can turn into a human before it turns into one right before her eyes

_______

Typhoons keep hitting my country and I have a mountain of modules to do and submit but I decided to make this instead, I currently can't stop rewatching we escape to survive story, I'm considering on making an Ena bot on how hard the rain goes in here.

Janitors new update is confusing that's why I aged her up
